author: barnabasbusa
content: We now have migrated all our log backend into a clickhouse cluster, which is significantly faster and AI friendly

author: barnabasbusa
content: so you should be able to ask your claude to fetch all the logs around this time, and you should have access to it

author: barnabasbusa
content: Its gonna be maybe 5mins tops but once you get the hang of it, it should help you going forward

author: barnabasbusa
content: and never gonna need to ssh into the nodes to fetch logs anymore

author: barnabasbusa
content: https://github.com/ethpandaops/panda install this tool, and authenticate with your gh to have access to all the logs / traces
